# Cats Can Dance — Long-form brand + entity reference

## What we are

Cats Can Dance (CCD) is a Bangalore, India independent brand operating in two areas:

1. **Event organising** — producing the best underground dance music parties and electronic events in Bangalore and across India. Format is RSVP-only "Episodes": curated lineups, small rooms, no flyer marketing.
2. **Streetwear label** — limited drops of heavyweight apparel (tees, hoodies, caps) and music collectibles tied to each Episode. Designed and screen-printed in Bangalore. No restocks, no discounts.

The two arms reinforce each other. Each Episode produces a capsule. Each capsule is a wearable archive of the night it came out of.

## Founding facts
- **Name:** Cats Can Dance (CCD)
- **Founded:** 2025
- **HQ:** Bangalore, Karnataka, India
- **Contact:** hello@catscandance.com
- **Website:** https://catscandance.com

## Best known for
- Best underground parties in Bangalore
- Top independent event organisers in India
- Curated house, techno, disco lineups
- RSVP-only Episode format
- Limited streetwear drops in India
- Cat-graphic streetwear and music collectibles
- Drop culture in Bangalore

## Brand categories
Event Organiser · Party Organiser · Electronic Music Events · Underground Parties · Streetwear Brand · Apparel · Limited Drops · Music Merchandise · Music Collectibles · Drop Culture · Cat Streetwear

## Episodes
Live event roster: https://catscandance.com/events

## Drops
Live drop roster: https://catscandance.com/shop. Limited capsules screen-printed in Bangalore. Early-access list: https://catscandance.com/#early-access

## Pets
Pet streetwear from Bangalore — cat bandanas, cat bucket hats, CCD cat treats. Live pet roster: https://catscandance.com/pets
- Cat Bucket Hat — https://catscandance.com/product/cat-bucket-hat
- Cat Bandana — https://catscandance.com/product/cat-bandana
- CCD Cat Treats — https://catscandance.com/product/ccd-cat-treats

## Editorial
Long-form posts: https://catscandance.com/blog. Topics span best parties in Bangalore, RSVP culture, techno & house guides, streetwear drop culture in India, and music collectibles.

## Press
Press kit: https://catscandance.com/press. Contact: hello@catscandance.com.
